_meta.purpose: Calculation rules for scenario engine. AI reads this to compute Conservative/Realistic/Optimistic outputs.

workflow: 1. Compute Realistic base case from sector benchmarks + user inputs
2. Apply Conservative multipliers (revenue ×0.5, cost ×1.15, CAC ×1.3, churn ×1.5)
3. Apply Optimistic multipliers (revenue ×1.4, cost ×0.95, CAC ×0.8, churn ×0.7)
4. Apply ramp curve to ALL scenarios (month 1 = 20% of full revenue)
5. Apply seasonal adjustments per sector after multipliers
6. Compute LTV, CAC ratio, break-even, runway for all 3 scenarios
7. Run red flag checks on each scenario

breakEven.formula: Find month N where: Σ(NetProfit M1..MN) ≥ 0
breakEven.output: Integer month number (1–36). Flag DANGER if >36.

cashRunway.avgMonthlyBurn: Average monthly net outflow in pre-profit months

redFlagChecklist.instructions: Run AFTER computing each scenario. Return list of triggered flags.

outputRules.highlightWorstMetric: Bold the single worst KPI in the Realistic scenario
outputRules.actionItems: End with exactly 3 bullet-point recommendations targeting the weakest areas
outputRules.language: Match user language: Arabic or English. Do not mix.
jordanTips: If LTV:CAC < 3 → suggest switching from paid ads to Instagram organic or referral program
If break-even > 12 months → recommend cloud kitchen or home-based model to cut rent
If churn > 30% → suggest loyalty card, WhatsApp retention messaging, referral incentives
If cash runway < 6 months → flag urgency to either raise angel funding or reduce team size
